summary:
Swann utilizes Terran Mechanical units such as Siege Tanks and Thors to build up his army. These units are backed up by his powerful Drakken Laser Drill, which can be upgraded to unlock additional abilities. Finally, he is also able to construct a wide variety of static defense, allowing him to control strategic positions on the map.

Swann is a very difficult commander to play, and requires a lot of micro to ensure his army remains effective. However, a veteran Swann player's army can be terrifyingly strong, shredding any attack wave that approaches it within seconds.
